name: codex-thread-extractor
description: Extract, replay, audit, and recover local Codex Desktop conversation threads.

interface.shortDescription: Replay, audit, and recover Codex Desktop threads.
interface.longDescription: Use Codex Thread Extractor to summarize local Codex Desktop conversations, audit skill or rule behavior, and build bounded recovery handoffs for continuing short, long, or damaged threads.
defaultPrompt: Audit this Codex thread for rule compliance.
Summarize what happened in this thread.
